title: Provenance
description: Data provenance and attribution information. Tracks the source, creation date, modification history, and licensing of entity data.

source.description: Name or identifier of the primary data source.

sourceUrl.description: URL of the original data source.

creator.description: Person or entity who created this data.

created.description: Timestamp when this entity was created (ISO 8601 format).

modified.description: Timestamp when this entity was last modified (ISO 8601 format).

license.description: License under which this data is provided. Should be a URI to the license.

contributors.description: List of contributors who have modified this data.

confidence.description: Confidence level in the data accuracy (0-1 scale).

verified.description: Whether this data has been verified by an expert.

licenseOptions.name: CC BY-SA 4.0
licenseOptions.description: Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0. Default license for Herbapedia content.

licenseOptions.name: CC0 1.0
licenseOptions.description: Public Domain Dedication. For content that should have no restrictions.

usageNotes: Use 'confidence' to indicate uncertainty in scraped or inferred data
Mark data as 'verified' after expert review
